languages.text: {n}В воцарившемся безмолвии слышится негромкий женский плач. Мать Гнотека обессиленно всхлипывает, сердито вытирая глаза рукой, но теперь на ее лице сияет улыбка облегчения.{/n} "Спасибо... Спасибо, Ваша Светлость! Я всю жизнь буду помнить о вашем участии и молиться за ваше благополучие".

{n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."
languages.original_text: {n}В воцарившемся безмолвии слышится негромкий женский плач. Я всю жизнь буду помнить о вашем участии и молиться за ваше благополучие".

Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

{n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

languages.text: {n}In der Stille hörst du das leise Schluchzen einer Frau. Gnotecs Mutter weint hemmungslos und wischt sich mit ihrer Hand die Tränen aus den Augen, als ein erleichtertes Lächeln ihr Gesicht erhellt.{/n} "Danke ... Danke, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich werde Euer Eingreifen nie vergessen und den Rest meines Lebens für Euch beten."
languages.original_text: {n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

traits.locale_text: {n}In der Stille hörst du das leise Schluchzen einer Frau. Gnotecs Mutter weint hemmungslos und wischt sich mit ihrer Hand die Tränen aus den Augen, als ein erleichtertes Lächeln ihr Gesicht erhellt.{/n} "Danke ... Danke, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich werde Euer Eingreifen nie vergessen und den Rest meines Lebens für Euch beten."

languages.text: {n}Dans le silence à couper au couteau, vous entendez les sanglots discrets d'une femme. La mère de Gnotec pleure à chaudes larmes, essuyant rageusement ses yeux avec le dos de sa main, mais à présent, un sourire de soulagement illumine ses traits.{/n} « Merci... Merci, Votre Seigneurie ! Je me souviendrai de votre intervention jusqu'à la fin de mes jours et je prierai pour votre salut. »
languages.original_text: {n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans le silence à couper au couteau, vous entendez les sanglots discrets d'une femme. La mère de Gnotec pleure à chaudes larmes, essuyant rageusement ses yeux avec le dos de sa main, mais à présent, un sourire de soulagement illumine ses traits.{/n} « Merci... Merci, Votre Seigneurie ! Je me souviendrai de votre intervention jusqu'à la fin de mes jours et je prierai pour votre salut. »

languages.text: {n}在一片寂静中，你听见女人低低的啜泣声。诺泰克的母亲不住地流着泪，用手狠狠擦着眼睛，但此刻，一丝如释重负的笑容点亮了她的面庞。{/n}“谢谢……谢谢您，大人！您的恩情，我这一辈子都不会忘记。我会日日为您的好运祈祷。”
languages.original_text: {n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

traits.locale_text: {n}在一片寂静中，你听见女人低低的啜泣声。诺泰克的母亲不住地流着泪，用手狠狠擦着眼睛，但此刻，一丝如释重负的笑容点亮了她的面庞。{/n}“谢谢……谢谢您，大人！您的恩情，我这一辈子都不会忘记。我会日日为您的好运祈祷。”

languages.text: {n}En medio del silencio, oyes el llanto callado de una mujer. La madre de Gnotec llora impotente, frotándose los ojos con la mano, pero ahora ves una sonrisa en sus labios.{/n} «Gracias... ¡Gracias, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Recordaré su intercesión el resto de mi vida y rezaré por su buena fortuna».
languages.original_text: {n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."

La madre de Gnotec llora impotente, frotándose los ojos con la mano, pero ahora ves una sonrisa en sus labios.{/n} «Gracias... ¡Gracias, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Recordaré su intercesión el resto de mi vida y rezaré por su buena fortuna».

languages.text: {n}テクノジュレンは手術台から身を起こし、カチャカチャと音を立ててメカノデンドライトから血まみれのドリルを外す。緑がかったバイザーがこちらを向く。{/n}「生命体の健康診断の依頼を受理した。アデプタス・メカニクスの病室にお進みください、大尉。"
languages.original_text: {n}The technojuren recoils from the operating table, unclipping the bloody drill from the mechanodendrite with a clinking sound. The greenish visors turn to you.{/n} "Request for general health check on lifeform accepted. Proceed to the Adeptus Mechanicus ward, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Sessizliğin içinde bir kadının hafif hıçkırıklarını duyuyorsun. Gnotec'in annesi çaresizce ağlıyor, eliyle öfkeyle gözlerini siliyor ama şimdi yüzünü rahatlamış bir gülümseme aydınlatıyor.{/n} "Teşekkür ederim... Teşekkür ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Şefaatinizi hayatımın sonuna kadar hatırlayacak ve iyi talihiniz için dua edeceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}In the silence, you hear the soft sobs of a woman. Gnotec's mother is weeping helplessly, furiously wiping her eyes with her hand, but now a smile of relief lights up her face.{/n} "Thank you... Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will remember your intercession for the rest of my life and pray for your good fortune."
